text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the camellia oil. It was really
wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
My tail was so scratchy with dust from the dirt
track, but the oil had it soft and smooth in no
time!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh, isn't that nice? Camellia oil's been used to
treat tails since the old days, you know.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
And your trick worked for the carpet in my room!
I thought I'd be in big trouble 'cause I couldn't get
that stain out.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Baking soda works a charm, doesn't it? Takes the
tea stains right out of a cup, too, so don't forget
now.

text_block_list.name: Hokko Tarumae
text_block_list.text:
Wow... You know so much, Acute! The wisdom
just pops right out of you!

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm nothing special, dearie. It's allll passed
down from our elders.

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
That does remind me, though. I've got a tiny little
favor to ask...

text_block_list.name: Wonder Acute
text_block_list.text:
I can't get a photo inside this email for the life of
me. Could you help? I'm just no good with
newfangled gadgets.
